tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with '[FAIL] Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18).

tests.name: baseline_build_loop_completes
tests.details: Baseline sponsored_poc project: started feature uat-feat-1, completed all 6 build_loop steps, committed feat: with no PreToolUse blockage, recorded via test-gate.sh.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json before upgrade; upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited 1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision' (PR #17 U-F stays fixed).

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: After clearing sentinel, upgrade-project.sh --to-production completed with '[OK] Upgrade complete.' Confirms PR #17 U-E fix (poc_mode read from phase-state.json) — sponsored_poc was correctly detected.

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: current_phase=2 and project='uat-agent-74' unchanged across upgrade.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: .claude/process-state.json byte-identical pre/post upgrade; build_loop history retained.

tests.name: build_progress_preserved
tests.details: .claude/build-progress.json byte-identical pre/post upgrade; uat-feat-1 still in features_completed.

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output flagged PRODUCT_MANIFESTO.md and PROJECT_BIBLE.md as missing-but-expected, plus 4 release-pipeline TODOs.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header includes BL-006 (2026-04-24), BL-015 (2026-04-25), BL-016 (2026-04-25) changelog entries.

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep of upgrade log for __PROJECT_NAME__ / __PLATFORM__ / __LANGUAGE__ / __TRACK__ returned 0 hits — U-I did not surface in this scenario.

tests.name: poc_mode_cleared_post_upgrade
tests.details: phase-state.json no longer contains poc_mode field; last_upgrade='2026-04-25' added; sponsored_poc constraints removed.

tests.name: deployment_field_unchanged_after_upgrade
tests.details: U-J confirmation: phase-state.json .deployment remains 'organizational' rather than transitioning to 'production' after --to-production. poc_mode is correctly removed but deployment scenario value never updates. Severity Medium per runbook (known-open prior-sweep bug).

framework_bugs.summary: U-J confirmation: deployment field not updated to 'production' after --to-production
framework_bugs.reproduction: init project sponsored_poc/organizational; run upgrade-project.sh --to-production; jq -r '.deployment' .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: .deployment becomes 'production' (or some marker reflecting the new scenario) so downstream gates know production rules apply
framework_bugs.actual: .deployment still 'organizational' post-upgrade. Only poc_mode is removed and last_upgrade added.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git ls-files | xargs grep with strict assignment regex (key="value") returns 0 hits in committed files. Loose word matches are documentation references only.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log absent (no FORCE/reset events) — N/A per runbook.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned nothing.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: framework HEAD d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 unchanged; git status -short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ (no tracked file modifications).

summary: Upgrade flow sponsored_poc/desktop/standard -> production passes: PR #17 U-E (poc_mode lookup) and U-F (sentinel respect) and PR #18 framework-self guard all confirmed regression-free; U-J (deployment field stays 'organizational' after --to-production) re-confirmed as still-open.
